files.cv:
# Feiyu Wu - Tailored CV Draft

Lund, Sweden | wufeiyuwfy@gmail.com | +46 0724438928

## Profile

Business-development and product-oriented founder with a Chinese-English international background, Sweden-based stakeholder experience, and hands-on experience turning early-stage opportunities into funded pilots, partner conversations, and executable product work. Founder of SensoryWind AB, incubated through LU Innovation, with funding from Lund University Innovation and Almi, a pilot with Gerdahallen, and collaboration with external engineering partners. Currently graduating from management studies at Lund University, with a strong interest in international partnerships, Nordic market expansion, and cross-border business execution.

## Fit For UnionPay International

- Chinese native and fluent English user with international study and project experience across China, Sweden, Denmark, and Australia.
- Sweden-based, with experience working with local stakeholders such as LU Innovation, Almi, Gerdahallen, Visit Lund, and engineering partners.
- Founder experience covering stakeholder management, business development, funding, pilot testing, partner communication, and operational follow-up.
- Strong hands-on mindset for field visits, testing, user/merchant observation, and translating feedback into practical next steps.

## Relevant Experience

### Founder and CEO - SensoryWind AB

- Built and developed a natural wind simulation system for indoor cycling, connecting user comfort, hardware development, and business potential.
- Secured SEK 180,000 from Lund University's Innovation program and SEK 100,000 from Almi.
- Conducted pilot testing at Gerdahallen and secured a Letter of Intent for further product integration and endorsement.
- Coordinated with Razorback Engineer AB to develop a functional prototype with scalability and manufacturability in mind.
- Managed stakeholder communication, product iteration, funding-related documentation, and partner follow-up in an early-stage startup environment.

### NASA Project - Master Thesis

- Developed a wellbeing-oriented nature simulation concept using synchronized wind speed, temperature, and scent.
- Worked with astronaut Jean-Francois Clervoy and was supervised by NASA experts Olga Bannova and Larry Toups.
- Translated user needs, environmental constraints, and technical possibilities into a product concept for mental wellbeing.

### Public And Stakeholder Projects

- H22 City Expo: core designer in a seven-person team representing Lund University in a future smart-city project organized by IKEA.
- Visit Lund: designed and built a public gathering space in Lund city center, working closely with local stakeholders and community needs.
- Bamboo Weaving Culture Inheritance Workshop: team leader and representative at an international exhibition in Australia.

## Education

- Lund University - Management studies, graduating this year. Confirm exact program title and month before submission.
- Lund University - Master of Fine Arts in Industrial Design.
- University of Nottingham Ningbo China - BEng Hons Product Design & Manufacture.

## Skills

- Business development: stakeholder communication, partner follow-up, funding acquisition, pilot testing, strategic execution.
- Market and user insight: user-centered research, questionnaires, field observation, feedback collection, report writing.
- Tools: Figma, Google Workspace, SolidWorks, KeyShot, Photoshop, Arduino, PyCharm.
- Languages: Chinese native, English IELTS 7, Swedish SFI 3C.

## Tailoring Notes Before Submission

- Add Excel, SQL, BI, financial reporting, or market-analysis examples if Fei has them.
- Confirm the exact management program title at Lund University.
- Add any payment, fintech, banking, merchant, retail, or China-Nordic partnership examples if available.
files.letter:
# Motivation Letter Draft

Dear UnionPay International team,

I am writing to express my interest in the Business Development role supporting the Nordic and Baltic markets. What attracts me most is the opportunity to work at the intersection of international payments, partner development, market expansion, and cross-cultural communication.

My background combines product development, entrepreneurship, stakeholder coordination, and international experience. As the founder of SensoryWind AB in Sweden, I have built an early-stage product from concept into funded and tested development. This included securing support from Lund University Innovation and Almi, running pilot testing with Gerdahallen, coordinating with engineering partners, and following up with stakeholders to move the project forward. These experiences have trained me to be proactive, detail-oriented, and comfortable working across business, user, and operational needs.

I believe I can bring particular value to UnionPay International because I can bridge Chinese and Nordic working contexts. I am a native Chinese speaker, use English professionally, and have studied and worked on projects in Sweden for several years. I understand both the importance of clear headquarters communication and the need to adapt business development work to local partners, merchants, and market realities.

Although my direct background is not in payments, I am strongly motivated to learn the payment ecosystem, including acquirers, merchant acceptance, transaction growth, and partner campaigns. I would bring a hands-on mindset to merchant visits, market analysis, reporting, and operational coordination, while building the financial-services knowledge needed to contribute more independently over time.

I would be happy to discuss how my founder experience, Chinese-English communication ability, and Sweden-based stakeholder background could support UnionPay International's Nordic and Baltic market development.

Kind regards,

Feiyu Wu

strengths: Chinese-English bridge with local Sweden/Nordic context, directly aligned with headquarters communication needs.
Founder experience gives credible business development evidence: funding, pilots, LOI, partners, stakeholder follow-up, and execution.
Strong fit for a developmental associate role because the job explicitly welcomes exceptional recent graduates.
Good narrative fit for Nordic/Baltic expansion: Fei can connect Chinese global payment infrastructure with local user and merchant realities.
Hands-on, field-oriented profile fits merchant visits, testing, and regional coordination better than a purely office-based candidate.
gaps: The LinkedIn post says applications are no longer accepted, so direct application may not be possible.
No direct payments, fintech, acquiring, merchant acceptance, or financial-services experience shown in the CV.
Data analysis tools for transaction analysis are under-evidenced; Excel/SQL/BI are not explicit.
Nordic language is only SFI 3C, so Swedish should be framed as developing, not professional fluency.
Large corporate reporting, compliance, and internal process experience is less visible than startup/project experience.
interview_points: Open with the China-Nordic bridge: Chinese native, English professional, Sweden-based, and comfortable across international contexts.
Use SensoryWind as proof of business development: securing funding, finding partners, piloting, managing stakeholders, and turning interest into concrete next steps.
Prepare a story about visiting/testing with users or stakeholders and converting observations into action.
Show curiosity about payments: acquirers, merchants, acceptance coverage, transaction volume, signage, and campaign performance.
Prepare a practical 30-60-90 day plan focused on learning payment ecosystem basics, mapping partners, supporting reporting, and joining merchant/partner visits.
Handle the data-tool gap proactively: say you can strengthen Excel/BI/SQL quickly and connect it to your prior reporting and PyCharm/Python exposure.
questions_to_ask: Since the posting appears closed, is the Nordic/Baltic Business Development role still open or is there a future intake?
What are the most important Nordic/Baltic market priorities for the first six months?
Which partners would this role work with most often: acquirers, payment providers, merchants, or headquarters teams?
What metrics define success: acceptance coverage, transaction volume, merchant activation, campaign results, or reporting quality?
How much travel is expected across Nordic and Baltic markets?
What data tools and reporting templates does the regional team use today?
How does the role grow from support work into independent ownership?

salary.note: Swedish business-development benchmarks vary widely. For Stockholm, affärsutvecklare averages are often around SEK 53k-64k/month, while this role is associate/developmental and suitable for 1-3 years or exceptional graduates. A Fei-specific reasonable discussion range is SEK 38k-48k/month, with SEK 45k as a practical midpoint and higher upside if they value Chinese-English headquarters coordination plus founder experience.

files.deepReport:
# Company Job Validation Report

## 1. Executive summary

- Company: Medeon Science Park
- Position: Incubator Manager
- Country: Sweden
- City/region: Malmö
- Candidate level: senior-leaning stretch for Feiyu
- Field: life science incubation, startup support, innovation, commercialization, business development
- Overall recommendation: Continue but verify key issues
- Overall score: 3.7 / 5
- Parent-friendly summary: Medeon is a legitimate and established Malmö life-science science park with public ownership by the City of Malmö and Wihlborgs. The role is highly aligned with Feiyu's startup, innovation, funding, validation, and ecosystem interests, but it appears more senior than a typical early-career role because it asks for overall responsibility for the incubator, fundraising/financing optimization, and leading business coaches. Feiyu should treat this as a strong stretch opportunity and verify language expectations, leadership seniority, salary, and support structure before investing heavily.

## 2. Scorecard

| Area | Score 1-5 | Evidence status | Confidence | Explanation |
|---|---:|---|---|---|
| Company legitimacy | 5 | Found publicly | High | Medeon has an official website, named CEO, address, public ownership, long operating history, and a visible role page. |
| Financial stability | 4 | Found publicly | Medium | Medeon is owned by City of Malmö and Wihlborgs Fastigheter, which lowers legitimacy risk, but role budget and finances are not published in the ad. |
| Role clarity | 4 | Found publicly | High | The role page describes responsibilities, reporting line, focus areas, and application route. |
| Candidate-role fit | 4 | Estimated from public signals | Medium | Feiyu's founder and LU Innovation experience fit startup support, validation, and commercialization, but direct incubator leadership is limited. |
| Learning potential | 5 | Found publicly | High | The role sits inside a strong life-science innovation ecosystem with startups, scaleups, labs, healthcare, industry, and investors. |
| Manager/team support signals | 3 | Found publicly | Medium | The role reports to the CEO, but the level of mentoring for a stretch candidate is not clear. |
| Salary fairness | 3 | Estimated from public signals | Medium | Comparable Swedish business manager salaries can be high, but nonprofit/science-park pay and exact seniority are unknown. |
| Benefits clarity | 2 | Must ask employer | Medium | Pension, collective agreement, overtime, wellness allowance, and vacation terms are not published. |
| Contract clarity | 3 | Found publicly | Medium | Application route and reporting line are clear; employment type and detailed contract terms are not visible. |
| Work-life balance signals | 3 | Estimated from public signals | Low | Strategic plus operational responsibility, events, investor relations, and startup support may create broad workload. |
| Cross-border complexity | 4 | Found publicly | High | Feiyu lives in Sweden and the job is in Malmö, so Denmark/Sweden cross-border issues are not central. |
| Overall opportunity quality | 4 | Estimated from public signals | Medium | Excellent strategic fit and legitimacy, but likely seniority mismatch needs careful handling. |

## 3. Public facts found

| Item | Finding | Evidence status | Confidence | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Job status | Medeon published the Incubator Manager role on 2026-05-12 and invites applications by CV and short motivation statement. | Found publicly | High | https://www.medeon.se/stories-news/blog/incubator-manager/ |
| Application route | The role page says to send application materials to medeon@medeon.se and direct questions to CEO Malin Bornschein. | Found publicly | High | https://www.medeon.se/stories-news/blog/incubator-manager/ |
| Deadline signal | Medicon Village listed the Incubator Manager role with application deadline 26 May. | Found publicly | Medium | https://se.linkedin.com/company/mediconvillage |
| Role scope | The role has overall responsibility for Medeon's incubator and supports ideas, startups, and scaleups with validation, funding, commercialization, and scaling. | Found publicly | High | https://www.medeon.se/stories-news/blog/incubator-manager/ |
| Reporting line | The role reports to the CEO of Medeon Science Park. | Found publicly | High | https://www.medeon.se/stories-news/blog/incubator-manager/ |
| Focus areas | Medeon focuses on medtech, diabetes, oral health, healthy aging, with prevention as a cross-cutting theme. | Found publicly | High | https://www.medeon.se/stories-news/blog/incubator-manager/ |
| Company history | Medeon describes itself as Scandinavia's first and most experienced life-science-focused science park, established in 1985. | Found publicly | High | https://www.medeon.se/about-us/who-we-are/ |
| Ownership | Medeon is owned by the City of Malmö (60%) and Wihlborgs Fastigheter AB (40%). | Found publicly | High | https://www.medeon.se/about-us/owners-board/ |
| Ecosystem | Medeon says it provides business development, strategic networks, infrastructure, and collaboration between industry, academia, and the public sector. | Found publicly | High | https://www.medeon.se/about-us/who-we-are/ |
| Salary benchmark | Unionen's 2025 Swedish market salary range for business manager and similar roles was SEK 47,000-97,470/month. | Found publicly | Medium | https://www.unionen.se/rad-och-stod/om-lon/marknadsloner/business-manager |

## 4. Estimated signals

| Area | Estimate | Reasoning | Confidence | How to verify |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Role seniority | Senior or senior-leaning | Overall incubator responsibility, leading business coaches, fundraising/financing optimization, and CEO reporting suggest meaningful seniority. | High | Ask whether they consider early-career founder profiles or require prior incubator/program leadership. |
| Feiyu fit | Strong thematic fit but seniority stretch | Feiyu has founder, LU Innovation, Almi, prototype, validation, and pilot experience, but not yet a long record coaching many startups. | Medium | Ask whether founder/operator experience can substitute for incubator management experience. |
| Language risk | Swedish or Scandinavian language may matter | The role is in Malmö, works with regional companies and healthcare/industry actors, and the digest flagged Scandinavian language preference. The official page should be checked directly for final wording before applying. | Medium | Ask if English is sufficient for daily work and external stakeholder meetings. |
| Salary fairness | Likely should not be junior-level pay | The role's responsibility level suggests compensation should reflect management/business-development responsibility. | Medium | Ask for salary range and collective agreement status. |

## 5. Salary benchmark

- Likely salary range: SEK 42,000-58,000/month for a nonprofit/science-park incubator manager context; higher may be possible if the role is treated as senior business-development management.
- Sources used: official role responsibilities, Malmö location, and Unionen business manager salary benchmark.
- Offered salary assessment: unknown because salary is not published.
- Caveats: Unionen's business manager group is broad and may include more commercial roles than a science-park nonprofit role. Medeon's exact collective agreement and salary structure must be checked.
- Negotiation notes: Because this role carries overall incubator responsibility, avoid accepting a junior salary unless mentoring, title, scope, and growth path are clearly favorable.

| Salary item | Finding | Evidence status | Confidence | Source / note |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Published salary | Not found in the role page. | Not found | High | Medeon role page does not show salary. |
| Swedish benchmark | Unionen's 2025 business manager range was SEK 47,000-97,470/month. | Found publicly | Medium | https://www.unionen.se/rad-och-stod/om-lon/marknadsloner/business-manager |
| Feiyu-specific practical range | SEK 42,000-52,000/month would be a cautious discussion range if they see her as a stretch candidate; role responsibility may justify more. | Estimated from public signals | Medium | Verify with employer and union advice. |

## 6. Red flags

| Red flag | Evidence | Severity | What to ask or verify |
|---|---|---|---|
| Role may be too senior for Feiyu right now | The role has overall responsibility for the incubator and includes leading business coaches. | Medium | "Would you consider a founder/innovation profile without prior incubator manager title?" |
| Language expectations are uncertain | Regional stakeholder, healthcare, and startup support work may require Swedish/Scandinavian even if not obvious from the summary. | Medium | "Is English sufficient for daily work, coaching, and partner meetings?" |
| Salary and benefits are unpublished | No salary, collective agreement, pension, overtime, or benefits are listed. | Medium | "What salary range and collective agreement/benefit package apply?" |
| Broad strategic and operational workload | The role covers strategy, operations, financing, coaches, events, partners, healthcare, industry, investors, and owners. | Mild | "What are the first-year priorities and what support team is in place?" |

## 7. Green flags

| Green flag | Evidence | Why it matters |
|---|---|---|
| Strong legitimacy | Medeon has long history, public ownership, official address, named CEO, and public role page. | Low scam risk and strong ecosystem credibility. |
| Excellent startup-support alignment | The role focuses on validation, funding, commercialization, scaling, and innovation support. | Directly fits Feiyu's founder and LU Innovation experience. |
| Malmö location | The job is in Malmö, close to Lund. | Practical compared with Copenhagen or Stockholm roles. |
| Life-science and medtech ecosystem | Medeon focuses on medtech, diabetes, oral health, healthy aging, and prevention. | Strong bridge to Feiyu's health/wellbeing product interests. |
| CEO reporting line | The role reports to CEO Malin Bornschein. | High exposure and learning potential if expectations are realistic. |

## 8. Missing information

| Missing item | Why it matters | Who to ask | Suggested question |
|---|---|---|---|
| Required experience level | Determines whether Feiyu is realistically competitive. | CEO / hiring team | "How many years of incubator, startup coaching, or leadership experience do you expect?" |
| Language requirement | Swedish may be needed for regional stakeholder work. | CEO / HR | "Is English sufficient, or is professional Swedish/Scandinavian required?" |
| Salary range | Determines fairness for a high-responsibility role. | CEO / HR | "What salary range is budgeted for the Incubator Manager role?" |
| Team structure | The role mentions leading coaches; support level is unclear. | CEO | "How many coaches and team members support the incubator?" |
| Contract and collective agreement | Affects pension, overtime, insurance, and job security. | HR / CEO | "Is the role covered by a collective agreement or equivalent employment policy?" |

## 9. Potential LinkedIn connectors

No confirmed current Medeon employee with a clear Lund University connection was identified for direct coffee-chat outreach in this quick website-report pass. Broader public results show useful nearby ecosystem leads in Lund/Malmö life science and innovation who may understand Medeon's environment.

| Person | Current public role/company | Lund University connection | Why relevant | Evidence status | Confidence | Suggested coffee-chat angle | Source |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Annie George Chandy | Abarceo Pharma / past public connection to Medeon Science Park, Malmö | Lund University | Broader life-science innovation and Medeon ecosystem perspective, not a confirmed current Medeon contact. | Estimated from public signals | Low | Ask about Malmö life-science startup ecosystem and what incubator roles usually require. | https://se.linkedin.com/in/annie-george-chandy-7b5a135 |
| Lund/Malmö life-science innovation leads | Nearby ecosystem contacts at LU Innovation, Medicon Village, SmiLe Venture Hub, and Ideon | Lund University ecosystem | Useful if no Medeon direct contact is available. | Estimated from public signals | Low | Ask what experience level is expected for incubator manager roles in Skåne. | Search result review |

### Coffee-chat message template

Hi, I am considering the Incubator Manager role at Medeon Science Park. My background is in product development, startup founding, LU Innovation, and health/wellbeing product concepts. I would value a short 15-minute conversation about what makes someone successful in life-science incubation in Malmö. Thank you.

### Coffee-chat questions

- How senior are incubator manager roles usually in the Skåne life-science ecosystem?
- Is Swedish normally required for coaching startups and working with regional partners?
- What experience would make a founder profile credible for this kind of role?

## 10. Questions to ask the employer

### Salary and salary review
- What is the salary range for this position?
- Is there an annual salary review?

### Collective agreement / contract
- Is the role covered by a collective agreement?
- What probation and notice periods apply?

### Pension and insurance
- What occupational pension and insurance package is included?
- Is there wellness allowance or occupational healthcare?

### Overtime and working hours
- What are normal weekly hours?
- Are evening events or investor/startup events expected, and how is overtime handled?

### Manager and team support
- Who supports the Incubator Manager day to day?
- How many coaches or program staff are currently connected to the incubator?

### Learning and development
- Would there be onboarding in life-science regulation, funding, and medtech commercialization?

### Remote/hybrid work
- Is the role fully on-site at Medeon or partly hybrid?

### Role expectations
- What are the top three first-year goals?
- What does success look like after 6 and 12 months?

### Cross-border Denmark/Sweden issues
- Not central if Feiyu lives and works in Sweden. If any Denmark travel or remote work is added later, verify tax, pension, social insurance, and travel rules separately.

## 11. Contract items to check before signing

| Contract item | What to check | Risk if unclear |
|---|---|---|
| Job title and scope | Whether the title includes full incubator ownership from day one. | Too much responsibility without support. |
| Salary | Monthly gross salary and review timing. | Underpayment for senior responsibility. |
| Collective agreement | Whether Swedish collective agreement terms apply. | Weak pension/overtime clarity. |
| Pension and insurance | Occupational pension and insurance levels. | Lower total compensation. |
| Working hours | Events, evening work, and flex/overtime rules. | Hidden workload. |
| Language requirement | English vs Swedish/Scandinavian expectations. | Eligibility risk. |
| Team support | Number of coaches and operational staff. | Role may be too broad for one person. |
| Probation and notice | Probation and termination terms. | Planning risk. |

## 12. Candidate-friendly summary

This is a very attractive role on paper because it connects directly to Feiyu's real experience: founding SensoryWind, getting support from LU Innovation and Almi, developing prototypes, validating with users, and thinking about commercialization. It is also in Malmö, which is practical from Lund.

The main caution is seniority. This is not just a startup-support assistant role. Medeon describes overall responsibility for the incubator, financing efforts, structure, business coaches, partners, and CEO reporting. Feiyu should apply only with a confident story and should quickly verify whether they are open to a high-potential founder profile rather than an already experienced incubator leader.

## 13. Final recommendation

- Final recommendation: Continue but verify key issues
- Main reason: Strong legitimacy and strategic fit, but likely seniority and language expectations need verification.
- What would improve the recommendation: English accepted for daily work, clear support team, openness to founder profile, fair salary, and realistic first-year goals.
- What would make the recommendation worse: professional Swedish requirement, expectation of many years managing incubators, low salary for broad responsibility, or little support from CEO/team.
- Next 3 actions:
  - Apply quickly if still open, because the deadline signal is May 26.
  - Frame SensoryWind, LU Innovation, funding, validation, and commercialization as the core fit story.
  - Ask language, seniority, support team, salary, collective agreement, and first-year goals before investing too much time.

## 14. Sources

- Medeon Incubator Manager role page: https://www.medeon.se/stories-news/blog/incubator-manager/
- Medeon Who We Are page: https://www.medeon.se/about-us/who-we-are/
- Medeon Owners & Board page: https://www.medeon.se/about-us/owners-board/
- Medicon Village LinkedIn job roundup mentioning deadline: https://se.linkedin.com/company/mediconvillage
- Unionen business manager salary benchmark: https://www.unionen.se/rad-och-stod/om-lon/marknadsloner/business-manager

## 15. Research metadata

- Date researched: 2026-05-24
- Company name: Medeon Science Park
- Position name: Incubator Manager
- Country: Sweden
- City/region: Malmö
- Job ad URL: https://www.medeon.se/stories-news/blog/incubator-manager/
- Candidate level: senior-leaning stretch
- Field: life science incubation, startup support, innovation, commercialization, business development
- Candidate lives in: Sweden
- Work location: Sweden
- Cross-border Sweden/Denmark issues apply: No

# 中文公司与职位深度分析报告

## 1. 快速结论

## 2. 为什么可能适合 Feiyu

- Feiyu 当前定位：刚毕业，约 3 年硬件创业/产品开发经验，适合初级、毕业生、associate、junior、产品开发、硬件产品管理、技术产品支持类路径。
- 这个职位的本地摘要：Incubator role supporting startups with validation, funding, commercialization, scaling, events, and investor relations.

# Feiyu Wu - Tailored CV Draft

Lund, Sweden | wufeiyuwfy@gmail.com | +46 0724438928

## Profile

Product-development oriented founder and industrial designer with a strong interest in growing into a product manager role. Experienced in turning early ideas into tested concepts, working across users, engineering partners, stakeholders, funding bodies, and prototype development. Founder of SensoryWind AB, a health and comfort-focused product for indoor cycling, with funding from Lund University Innovation and Almi, pilot testing at Gerdahallen, and engineering collaboration on a functional prototype. Currently graduating from management studies at Lund University, combining design, engineering-oriented product development, and business thinking.

## Fit For Aimpoint Junior Product Manager

- Recent graduate profile combining engineering/design education and management studies.
- Hands-on product development experience from idea, user need, prototype, pilot, and stakeholder support.
- Strong match with cross-functional work across business, R&D/engineering, operations, and market-facing needs.
- Practical understanding of physical products, manufacturability, reliability, user experience, and value creation.
- Motivated to grow into structured product management through a graduate program.

## Relevant Experience

### Founder and CEO - SensoryWind AB

- Developed a natural wind simulation system for indoor cycling that connects user comfort, physical product design, and product-market potential.
- Secured SEK 180,000 from Lund University's Innovation program and SEK 100,000 from Almi.
- Conducted pilot testing at Gerdahallen and secured a Letter of Intent for further integration and endorsement.
- Collaborated with Razorback Engineer AB to develop a functional prototype with scalability and manufacturability in mind.
- Worked across product direction, user feedback, stakeholder communication, funding, partner coordination, and fast product iteration.

### NASA Project - Master Thesis

- Developed a nature-therapy concept using synchronized wind speed, temperature, and scent to support wellbeing in space.
- Worked with astronaut Jean-Francois Clervoy and was supervised by NASA experts Olga Bannova and Larry Toups.
- Translated user needs, technical possibilities, and environmental constraints into a product concept.

### H22 City Expo / Visit Lund

- Designed public-space concepts with multidisciplinary teams and external stakeholders.
- Represented Lund University in a future smart-city project organized by IKEA.
- Delivered functional physical installations shaped by community needs and collaboration.

## Education

- Lund University - Management studies, graduating this year. Confirm exact program title and graduation month before submission.
- Lund University - Master of Fine Arts in Industrial Design.
- University of Nottingham Ningbo China - BEng Hons Product Design & Manufacture.

## Skills

- Product development: concept development, user-centered research, prototyping, pilot testing, manufacturability thinking, stakeholder alignment.
- Business and strategy: funding acquisition, value proposition development, strategic execution, partner communication.
- Tools: SolidWorks, KeyShot, Figma, Photoshop, Arduino, PyCharm, Google Workspace.
- Prototyping: 3D printing, CNC machining, laser cutting, workshop model-making, wood/cardboard/clay/foam/metals/stone.
- Languages: Chinese native, English IELTS 7, Swedish SFI 3C.

## Tailoring Notes Before Submission

- Confirm the exact Lund management program name.
- Add any product analytics, market analysis, profitability, or business-case examples if available.
- Add a short portfolio link if Fei has one.
files.letter:
# Motivation Letter Draft

Dear Sandberg Development and Aimpoint team,

I am excited to apply for the Graduate Program - Junior Product Manager role at Aimpoint because it matches the direction I want to grow in: product management at the intersection of technology, user needs, business value, and high-quality physical products.

My background combines industrial design, product development, entrepreneurship, and management studies. As the founder of SensoryWind AB, I have been developing a natural wind simulation system for indoor cycling. This work has required me to move from an early idea to a tested product concept, secure funding, coordinate with engineering partners, run pilot testing, and communicate with stakeholders. Through this process, I learned how important it is to understand both why a product matters and how it can create value for users and the business.

What attracts me to this role is the opportunity to learn the full product journey in a structured graduate program while contributing to real projects at Aimpoint. I am especially interested in how product decisions are made in a high-reliability product environment, where quality, precision, user understanding, and long-term product strategy all matter. My design and prototyping background helps me understand physical product experience, while my founder experience has trained me to be proactive, adaptable, and comfortable working across uncertainty.

I also see strong value in the Sandberg Development Graduate Program and the innovation and leadership training with EFL Executive Education. Since I am currently graduating from management studies at Lund University, this combination of project-based product work and leadership development feels like a very relevant next step.

I would be glad to bring my hands-on product development experience, international background, and motivation to grow into product management to Aimpoint and Sandberg Development.

Kind regards,

Feiyu Wu

## 5. Salary benchmark

- Likely salary range: SEK 33,000-46,000/month gross for this specific graduate/junior PM context; a practical target discussion range is SEK 38,000-42,000/month if asked.
- Sources used: role ad, graduate-program positioning, public salary guidance sources such as Saco salary guidance pages and secondary product-manager salary aggregators.
- Offered salary assessment: unknown because the employer has not published salary.
- Caveats: Product Manager salary sources often describe experienced software/product managers and can overstate expectations for a graduate program. Malmö salary levels may also differ from Stockholm.
- Negotiation notes: do not negotiate only base salary. Ask for pension, insurance, overtime compensation, salary review after the graduate year, and title/role path after completion.

## 6. Red flags

| Red flag | Evidence | Severity | What to ask or verify |
|---|---|---|---|
| Defense/hunting/sport shooting exposure may not fit Feiyu's values | Aimpoint publicly describes users including hunters, sport shooters, law enforcement, and military users. | Medium | "Which customer segments and product categories would this role work with most closely?" |
| Salary and benefits not published | Job ad does not list salary, pension, insurance, overtime, bonus, or collective agreement. | Medium | "What is the salary range, pension contribution, insurance package, and overtime policy?" |
| Product analytics/profitability expectations may be challenging | Job ad asks for value creation, profitability, data interpretation, trends, and actionable insights. | Mild | "What tools and data sources does the team use, and what level is expected from a graduate?" |
| Role may involve broad cross-functional complexity | The role connects business, R&D, operations, and sales. | Mild | "What is the first-year project scope, and who helps prioritize work?" |

## 7. Green flags

| Green flag | Evidence | Why it matters |
|---|---|---|
| Real graduate structure | 12-month program, permanent employment, mentors, experts, and EFL Executive Education are described publicly. | Good for an early-career candidate who needs structured learning. |
| Strong company legitimacy | Aimpoint and Sandberg Development have long histories, official sites, published addresses, and public company signals. | Lower legitimacy risk than unknown small employers. |
| Product-development alignment | Role involves product evolution, customer value, cross-functional collaboration, and product strategy. | Fits Feiyu's design, prototype, founder, and stakeholder experience. |
| Malmö location | The role is in Sandberg Valley / Malmö. | Practical from Lund compared with Stockholm or Copenhagen. |
| Hardware/product context | Aimpoint is a physical-product company with high reliability demands. | Stronger fit for Feiyu than a purely software PM role. |

## 8. Missing information

| Missing item | Why it matters | Who to ask | Suggested question |
|---|---|---|---|
| Salary range | Determines fairness and whether the role is viable. | Recruiter / HR | "What is the salary range for this graduate position?" |
| Collective agreement | Affects pension, insurance, overtime, and negotiation baseline. | HR | "Is this role covered by a collective agreement?" |
| Pension and insurance | Important for Swedish employment quality. | HR | "What pension and insurance package is included?" |
| Overtime policy | Cross-functional roles can expand quickly. | Hiring manager | "How is overtime handled, and what workload is normal during the graduate year?" |
| Manager/mentor setup | Critical for junior success. | Hiring manager | "Who will mentor the graduate junior product manager day to day?" |
| Post-program title/path | Determines career value after 12 months. | Hiring manager / HR | "What role do successful graduates usually move into after the program?" |
| Defense-domain exposure | Personal fit and values question. | Hiring manager | "How much of this role is connected to defense, law enforcement, hunting, or sport-shooting product lines?" |

## 9. Questions to ask the employer

### Salary and salary review
- What is the monthly salary range for this graduate position?
- Is there a planned salary review after the 12-month program?
- Is there any bonus or performance-based compensation?

### Collective agreement / contract
- Is the employment covered by a Swedish collective agreement?
- Is the role permanent from day one, and is there a probation period?
- What notice period applies during and after probation?

### Pension and insurance
- What occupational pension contribution is included?
- What health, accident, travel, and life insurance is included?
- Is there wellness allowance or occupational healthcare?

### Overtime and working hours
- What are the normal weekly working hours?
- How is overtime tracked and compensated?
- Are there busy periods connected to product launches or customer deadlines?

### Manager and team support
- Who is the direct manager?
- Will the graduate have a senior Product Manager mentor?
- How often are feedback and development meetings held?

### Learning and development
- What parts of the EFL Executive Education program are included?
- What project would the graduate likely start with?
- What skills should the candidate build before starting?

### Remote/hybrid work
- Is the role fully on-site at Sandberg Valley, hybrid, or flexible?
- Which meetings require office presence?

### Role expectations
- What does success look like after 3, 6, and 12 months?
- What decisions can the graduate make independently?
- What data or product tools does the team use?

### Cross-border Denmark/Sweden issues, if relevant
- Not central if Feiyu lives and works in Sweden. If any Denmark travel or remote work is added later, verify tax, pension, social insurance, currency, commuting, and remote-work rules with official sources.

## 10. Contract items to check before signing

| Contract item | What to check | Risk if unclear |
|---|---|---|
| Job title | Confirm title during program and after completion. | Weak title may reduce future career value. |
| Salary | Monthly gross salary and review date. | Underpayment or unclear raise path. |
| Working hours | Standard weekly hours and flexibility. | Hidden workload. |
| Probation | Length and conditions. | Unclear job security. |
| Notice period | During probation and after. | Planning risk. |
| Vacation | Annual paid vacation days. | Benefit mismatch. |
| Pension | Occupational pension percentage and provider. | Lower total compensation. |
| Insurance | Health, accident, travel, and life insurance. | Personal financial risk. |
| Overtime | Compensation, flex time, or included in salary. | Unpaid extra work. |
| Bonus | Any bonus eligibility. | Misunderstood compensation. |
| Remote/hybrid terms | Office days and flexibility. | Commute/work-life mismatch. |
| Collective agreement | Whether one applies. | Weak clarity on benefits and rights. |
| Salary review | Timing after graduate year. | Stagnant salary after role growth. |
| Work location | Sandberg Valley/Malmö and travel expectations. | Commute or travel burden. |
| Restrictive clauses | Non-compete, confidentiality, IP terms. | Future job/business limitations. |

## 11. Candidate-friendly summary

This looks like one of the better opportunities for Feiyu because it is not asking for many years of product-management experience. It is a graduate path into product management, in a real physical-product company, with structured leadership and innovation training. Feiyu can use SensoryWind, prototype work, funding, pilots, stakeholder coordination, and management studies as the main story.

The biggest caution is not legitimacy. The employer looks real and established. The bigger questions are whether Feiyu is comfortable with Aimpoint's defense/hunting/sport-shooting domain, whether the salary and benefits are fair, and whether the manager will provide enough support for a junior candidate.

## 12. Final recommendation

- Final recommendation: Continue but verify key issues
- Main reason: Strong early-career product fit and legitimate employer, but salary/benefits/contract details and domain comfort must be checked.
- What would improve the recommendation: clear salary above SEK 35k/month, strong pension/insurance, named senior PM mentor, clear post-program path, and comfortable product-domain scope.
- What would make the recommendation worse: low salary without strong benefits, unclear manager support, heavy unpaid overtime, vague post-program role, or direct work on product areas Feiyu is uncomfortable supporting.
- Next 3 actions:
  - Apply or continue the process if the domain feels acceptable.
  - Prepare interview answers around SensoryWind as a product-management story.
  - Ask salary, pension, overtime, collective agreement, mentorship, and post-program path questions before accepting.

# 中文公司与职位深度分析报告

## 1. 快速结论

- 公司：Aimpoint / Sandberg Development
- 职位：Graduate Program - Junior Product Manager
- 地点：Sandberg Valley, Malmö, Sweden
- 匹配分：88/100
- 初步建议：可以继续了解，但申请前需要核实关键问题
- 一句话判断：这个职位分数超过 70，值得进入候选池；但仍需确认职位是否接受早期职业候选人、英文是否足够、是否存在硬性 5+ 年经验要求，以及薪资/合同是否合理。

## 2. 为什么可能适合 Feiyu

- Feiyu 当前定位：刚毕业，约 3 年硬件创业/产品开发经验，适合初级、毕业生、associate、junior、产品开发、硬件产品管理、技术产品支持类路径。
- 这个职位的本地摘要：Sandberg Development's Graduate Program is based in Malmö and combines a project-based role in a portfolio company with an innovation and leadership program through EFL Executive Education. Aimpoint is hiring a Graduate Junior Product Manager to help shape product evolution from early ideas to market-leading solutions, working across business, R&D, operations, and sales.
- 硬件/实体产品信号：不明显。需要确认它是否真的符合硬件产品管理优先方向。

## 3. 匹配分拆解

- Must-have requirements: 28/30
- Relevant experience and achievements: 23/25
- Product/domain match: 13/15
- Software/tools/process match: 11/15
- Location/language fit: 9/10
- Growth potential and motivation: 4/5

## 4. 主要优势

- Best current match among tested jobs: graduate/junior PM path, not a senior PM role.
- Strong alignment with product development from early ideas to market-facing solutions.
- Engineering-design plus management background fits the Business/Engineering degree requirement.
- SensoryWind gives practical proof of product ownership, funding, pilots, stakeholder work, and prototype development.
- Malmö location is practical from Lund compared with Stockholm or Copenhagen roles.
- Aimpoint is a high-quality Swedish hardware/product company, which fits Fei's industrial design and physical-product strengths.

## 5. 主要风险

- Direct experience in defense, hunting, or sport shooting is not visible in the CV.
- Quantitative data analysis and profitability/P&L experience should be strengthened or framed carefully.
- The role may require comfort with defense-related products; Fei should decide whether that environment fits her values.
- Exact management degree title and graduation month should be confirmed before final submission.
- Swedish level is SFI 3C; do not imply professional Swedish unless the role confirms English is enough.
- 需要重新确认职位是否有硬性 5+ 年经验要求；如果有，未来普通 digest 应该跳过。
- 需要确认英文是否足够；如果要求流利瑞典语/丹麦语，应降低优先级或跳过。

## 6. 薪资信号

- 估算薪资：SEK 33000-46000/month
- 说明：This is a graduate/junior product manager program, so the likely range should be below mid-level product manager benchmarks. Unionen's product owner IT market salary range is much higher, and Glassdoor Malmö PM numbers also reflect experienced PMs. For this graduate junior role in Malmö, a practical expectation is about SEK 33k-46k/month, with SEK 38k-42k/month a reasonable target discussion range if asked.
- 面试中建议确认：月薪、养老金、保险、假期、试用期、加班政策、远程/混合办公规则。

## 7. 申请前要问的问题

- 这个职位是否适合刚毕业、但有约 3 年硬件创业/产品开发经验的人？
- SensoryWind 的用户测试、原型开发、资金申请、合作伙伴沟通和产品迭代，是否可以算作相关产品经验？
- 日常工作是否英文足够？
- 前 3-6 个月的成功标准是什么？
- 谁会直接管理或指导这个角色？
- 薪资区间和福利是什么？

## 8. 最终建议

- 如果职位仍开放、英文足够、没有硬性 5+ 年经验要求，并且工作内容接近硬件产品管理/产品开发：可以申请。
- 如果职位偏 senior、纯软件 PM、要求独立负责复杂路线图，或语言要求是流利瑞典语/丹麦语：建议跳过或低优先级观察。

## 9. 来源

- 本地网站数据：data/jobs.json
- 申请链接：https://sandbergdevelopmentab.teamtailor.com/en/jobs/7472258-graduate-program-junior-product-manager-at-aimpoint

files.deepReportZh:
# 中文公司与职位深度分析报告

## 1. 快速结论

- 公司：Duni Group
- 职位：E-commerce Manager to Duni Group
- 地点：Malmö, hybrid
- 匹配分：73/100
- 初步建议：可以继续了解，但申请前需要核实关键问题
- 一句话判断：这个职位分数超过 70，值得进入候选池；但仍需确认职位是否接受早期职业候选人、英文是否足够、是否存在硬性 5+ 年经验要求，以及薪资/合同是否合理。

## 2. 为什么可能适合 Feiyu

- Feiyu 当前定位：刚毕业，约 3 年硬件创业/产品开发经验，适合初级、毕业生、associate、junior、产品开发、硬件产品管理、技术产品支持类路径。
- 这个职位的本地摘要：E-commerce leadership role in Malmö driving profitable digital sales growth, customer journey improvement, e-commerce roadmap, UX, analytics, and cross-functional business/IT collaboration for Duni Group.
- 硬件/实体产品信号：不明显。需要确认它是否真的符合硬件产品管理优先方向。

## 3. 匹配分拆解

- 暂无分数拆解。

## 4. 主要优势

- Strong Malmö location and English application path; role connects product, customer journey, UX, analytics, digital growth, and cross-functional business/IT work.
- Good bridge from Fei’s product-development and management direction into commercial digital product ownership.

## 5. 主要风险

- This is a manager-level e-commerce role and likely expects proven digital growth/e-commerce leadership experience.
- 需要重新确认职位是否有硬性 5+ 年经验要求；如果有，未来普通 digest 应该跳过。
- 需要确认英文是否足够；如果要求流利瑞典语/丹麦语，应降低优先级或跳过。

## 6. 薪资信号

- 估算薪资：SEK 45k-70k/month
- 说明：Estimated Malmö e-commerce/digital manager range; verify salary, bonus, pension, and responsibility level directly.
- 面试中建议确认：月薪、养老金、保险、假期、试用期、加班政策、远程/混合办公规则。

## 7. 申请前要问的问题

- 这个职位是否适合刚毕业、但有约 3 年硬件创业/产品开发经验的人？
- SensoryWind 的用户测试、原型开发、资金申请、合作伙伴沟通和产品迭代，是否可以算作相关产品经验？
- 日常工作是否英文足够？
- 前 3-6 个月的成功标准是什么？
- 谁会直接管理或指导这个角色？
- 薪资区间和福利是什么？

## 8. 最终建议

- 如果职位仍开放、英文足够、没有硬性 5+ 年经验要求，并且工作内容接近硬件产品管理/产品开发：可以申请。
- 如果职位偏 senior、纯软件 PM、要求独立负责复杂路线图，或语言要求是流利瑞典语/丹麦语：建议跳过或低优先级观察。

## 9. 来源

- 本地网站数据：data/jobs.json
- 申请链接：https://dunigroupmalmo.teamtailor.com/jobs/7739715-e-commerce-manager-to-duni-group

# 中文公司与职位深度分析报告

## 1. 快速结论

- 公司：Samsung Nordics
- 职位：Product Manager MX - Graduate
- 地点：Kista, Stockholm, hybrid
- 匹配分：79/100
- 初步建议：可以继续了解，但申请前需要核实关键问题
- 一句话判断：这个职位分数超过 70，值得进入候选池；但仍需确认职位是否接受早期职业候选人、英文是否足够、是否存在硬性 5+ 年经验要求，以及薪资/合同是否合理。

## 2. 为什么可能适合 Feiyu

- Feiyu 当前定位：刚毕业，约 3 年硬件创业/产品开发经验，适合初级、毕业生、associate、junior、产品开发、硬件产品管理、技术产品支持类路径。
- 这个职位的本地摘要：Graduate product-management role in Samsung's MX Nordic team, supporting product strategy, market/customer analysis, portfolio work, sales performance, and cross-functional Nordic product decisions.
- 硬件/实体产品信号：不明显。需要确认它是否真的符合硬件产品管理优先方向。

## 3. 匹配分拆解

- 暂无分数拆解。

## 4. 主要优势

- Best early-career fit today because it is explicitly a graduate product-management role with 0-2 years of relevant experience.
- Strong bridge from Fei's product design, management studies, international background, and consumer-product interest.
- Language fit is good: English is mandatory, while Swedish and Korean are only meriting.

## 5. 主要风险

- The role is commercially and analytics-heavy, so Fei should emphasize market analysis, product strategy, Excel/data comfort, and business decision support.
- 需要重新确认职位是否有硬性 5+ 年经验要求；如果有，未来普通 digest 应该跳过。
- 需要确认英文是否足够；如果要求流利瑞典语/丹麦语，应降低优先级或跳过。

## 6. 薪资信号

- 估算薪资：SEK 34k-46k/month
- 说明：Graduate product-management roles in Stockholm/Kista likely sit below experienced PM benchmarks; confirm salary, pension, and review timing.
- 面试中建议确认：月薪、养老金、保险、假期、试用期、加班政策、远程/混合办公规则。

## 7. 申请前要问的问题

- 这个职位是否适合刚毕业、但有约 3 年硬件创业/产品开发经验的人？
- SensoryWind 的用户测试、原型开发、资金申请、合作伙伴沟通和产品迭代，是否可以算作相关产品经验？
- 日常工作是否英文足够？
- 前 3-6 个月的成功标准是什么？
- 谁会直接管理或指导这个角色？
- 薪资区间和福利是什么？

## 8. 最终建议

- 如果职位仍开放、英文足够、没有硬性 5+ 年经验要求，并且工作内容接近硬件产品管理/产品开发：可以申请。
- 如果职位偏 senior、纯软件 PM、要求独立负责复杂路线图，或语言要求是流利瑞典语/丹麦语：建议跳过或低优先级观察。

## 9. 来源

- 本地网站数据：data/jobs.json
- 申请链接：https://sec.wd3.myworkdayjobs.com/en-US/Samsung_Careers/job/Product-Manager-MX---Graduate_R116240

# 中文公司与职位深度分析报告

## 1. 快速结论

- 公司：Scania Group / TRATON
- 职位：Product Manager - E-mobility Charging & Power Distribution
- 地点：Södertälje, Sweden or Munich, hybrid
- 匹配分：74/100
- 初步建议：可以保留，但排在硬件产品岗位之后
- 一句话判断：这个职位在 2026-07-14 的 digest 中通过了初步开放状态、语言和经验筛选；它分数超过 70，所以自动生成中文深度分析，方便你点进详情页直接看。

## 2. 为什么可能适合 Feiyu

- Feiyu 当前定位：刚毕业，约 3 年硬件创业/产品开发经验，优先硬件产品经理、技术产品、产品开发、创新和用户中心的实体产品方向。
- 本职位摘要：Product manager role shaping TRATON Group charging, ePTO and power-distribution product portfolio across brands. Scope includes product strategy, roadmap, lifecycle management, requirements prioritization, engineering collaboration, market/customer value and senior stakeholder alignment.
- 匹配判断：Strong hardware/e-mobility stretch but seniority risk

## 3. 匹配分拆解

- Must-have requirements: 20/30，Asks for a technical master and 3-7 years in PM/planning/project management/charging infrastructure. Feiyu meets technical master and has 3 years founder experience, but domain PM is a stretch.
- Relevant experience: 18/25，SensoryWind founder experience supports product development, pilots and stakeholders, but commercial vehicle e-mobility is new.
- Product/domain match: 14/15，Very strong hardware/e-mobility/technical product direction.
- Tools/process match: 10/15，Roadmap, prioritization and cross-functional work fit; budget and senior stakeholder governance are stretch areas.
- Location/language/work authorization: 8/10，Södertälje hybrid possible; English is explicitly required.
- Growth potential: 4/5，Excellent strategic hardware PM learning path if accepted despite seniority risk.

## 4. 主要优势

- Directly aligned with hardware product management, e-mobility, charging and commercial vehicles.
- English is explicitly required; no Swedish must-have found.
- Feiyu’s founder work can be positioned as equivalent product/project/technical-commercial experience at the lower end of 3-7 years.

## 5. 主要风险

- 3-7 years and senior-stakeholder scope make this a stretch, not a junior role.
- Requires strong vehicle architecture and e-mobility systems understanding.
- Budget ownership and cross-brand portfolio strategy may exceed Feiyu’s current titled PM experience.

## 6. 语言与经验筛选

- 语言：Fluent English required; Swedish was not found as a requirement.
- 经验：没有发现硬性“必须 5+ 年”作为唯一门槛；如果面试中确认需要非常资深的独立 PM 经验，应降低优先级。

## 7. 薪资信号

- 估算薪资：SEK 50000-78000/month
- 说明：Estimated technical product manager range in Swedish automotive/e-mobility; exact salary not published.
- 建议确认：月薪、养老金、保险、假期、试用期、加班政策、远程/混合办公规则。

## 8. 申请前要问的问题

- Would 3 years as a hardware startup founder count toward the 3-7 years requirement?
- How much vehicle/e-mobility system knowledge must be already proven?
- Is the team open to an early-career candidate with strong hardware/product-development potential?
- What is the split between strategic portfolio work and hands-on product discovery?

## 9. 申请策略

Apply only as a targeted stretch, emphasizing founder product ownership, hardware systems, user value, pilot validation and technical-commercial coordination.

## 10. 最终建议

- 如果职位仍开放、英文足够、并且招聘方接受 SensoryWind 创业/硬件产品开发经验作为相关经验：可以申请。
- 如果确认要求资深 PM、流利瑞典语，或需要多年特定软件/行业经验：跳过或放低优先级。

## 11. 来源

- 本地网站数据：data/jobs.json
- 申请链接：https://se.linkedin.com/jobs/view/product-manager-at-scania-group-4438167758

files.deepReportZh:
# 中文公司与职位深度分析报告

## 1. 快速结论

- 公司：Rebtel
- 职位：Product Manager - Growth
- 地点：Stockholm, hybrid
- 匹配分：73/100
- 初步建议：可以继续了解，但申请前需要核实关键问题
- 一句话判断：这个职位分数超过 70，值得进入候选池；但仍需确认职位是否接受早期职业候选人、英文是否足够、是否存在硬性 5+ 年经验要求，以及薪资/合同是否合理。

## 2. 为什么可能适合 Feiyu

- Feiyu 当前定位：刚毕业，约 3 年硬件创业/产品开发经验，适合初级、毕业生、associate、junior、产品开发、硬件产品管理、技术产品支持类路径。
- 这个职位的本地摘要：Growth product role owning acquisition, onboarding, conversion, experiments, user understanding, and cross-functional work for Rebtel's international diaspora-focused products.
- 硬件/实体产品信号：不明显。需要确认它是否真的符合硬件产品管理优先方向。

## 3. 匹配分拆解

- 暂无分数拆解。

## 4. 主要优势

- Good match for Fei's founder/product background, customer/user testing, international profile, and ability to connect product decisions with commercial learning loops.
- Language fit: English OK. Listing says Rebtel works in English and the Stockholm office has many languages.

## 5. 主要风险

- Requires 3+ years in growth/product/commercial ownership and experiment design. Fei should frame founder work honestly without overstating growth PM experience.
- 需要重新确认职位是否有硬性 5+ 年经验要求；如果有，未来普通 digest 应该跳过。
- 需要确认英文是否足够；如果要求流利瑞典语/丹麦语，应降低优先级或跳过。

## 6. 薪资信号

- 估算薪资：暂未估算
- 说明：Likely SEK 50k-70k/month in Stockholm depending on seniority; listing also mentions bonus, pension, insurance, wellness allowance, and 30 vacation days.
- 面试中建议确认：月薪、养老金、保险、假期、试用期、加班政策、远程/混合办公规则。

## 7. 申请前要问的问题

- 这个职位是否适合刚毕业、但有约 3 年硬件创业/产品开发经验的人？
- SensoryWind 的用户测试、原型开发、资金申请、合作伙伴沟通和产品迭代，是否可以算作相关产品经验？
- 日常工作是否英文足够？
- 前 3-6 个月的成功标准是什么？
- 谁会直接管理或指导这个角色？
- 薪资区间和福利是什么？

## 8. 最终建议

- 如果职位仍开放、英文足够、没有硬性 5+ 年经验要求，并且工作内容接近硬件产品管理/产品开发：可以申请。
- 如果职位偏 senior、纯软件 PM、要求独立负责复杂路线图，或语言要求是流利瑞典语/丹麦语：建议跳过或低优先级观察。

## 9. 来源

- 本地网站数据：data/jobs.json
- 申请链接：https://rebtel.teamtailor.com/jobs/6578671-product-manager-growth

strengths: Good match for Fei's founder/product background, customer/user testing, international profile, and ability to connect product decisions with commercial learning loops.

# 中文公司与职位深度分析报告

## 1. 快速结论

- 公司：Volumental
- 职位：Senior Product Manager (AI Builder) - In-store Experience
- 地点：Stockholm, hybrid
- 匹配分：79/100
- 初步建议：可以继续了解，但申请前需要核实关键问题
- 一句话判断：这个职位分数超过 70，值得进入候选池；但仍需确认职位是否接受早期职业候选人、英文是否足够、是否存在硬性 5+ 年经验要求，以及薪资/合同是否合理。

## 2. 为什么可能适合 Feiyu

- Feiyu 当前定位：刚毕业，约 3 年硬件创业/产品开发经验，适合初级、毕业生、associate、junior、产品开发、硬件产品管理、技术产品支持类路径。
- 这个职位的本地摘要：Senior product role for Volumental's in-store FitTech experience, combining 3D scanning, machine learning, physical retail behavior, discovery with shoppers and staff, AI-assisted prototyping, and B2B2C product strategy.
- 硬件/实体产品信号：有。标题或摘要中出现硬件、实体产品、工程、汽车、相机、电子、原型或产品开发相关信号。

## 3. 匹配分拆解

- 暂无分数拆解。

## 4. 主要优势

- Excellent domain bridge for Fei: physical user experience, hardware/sensors, retail behavior, AI, and product discovery.
- The role values interaction design, usability, human behavior, customer observation, prototyping, and B2B2C thinking, which connects well with industrial design and SensoryWind.

## 5. 主要风险

- It asks for 5+ years of product management or equivalent product-building experience and is explicitly senior.
- Stockholm hybrid setup requires at least three office days per week.
- 需要重新确认职位是否有硬性 5+ 年经验要求；如果有，未来普通 digest 应该跳过。
- 需要确认英文是否足够；如果要求流利瑞典语/丹麦语，应降低优先级或跳过。

## 6. 薪资信号

- 估算薪资：SEK 55k-85k/month
- 说明：Estimated Stockholm senior PM range for a funded scale-up; verify base salary, options, pension, and office expectations.
- 面试中建议确认：月薪、养老金、保险、假期、试用期、加班政策、远程/混合办公规则。

## 7. 申请前要问的问题

- 这个职位是否适合刚毕业、但有约 3 年硬件创业/产品开发经验的人？
- SensoryWind 的用户测试、原型开发、资金申请、合作伙伴沟通和产品迭代，是否可以算作相关产品经验？
- 日常工作是否英文足够？
- 前 3-6 个月的成功标准是什么？
- 谁会直接管理或指导这个角色？
- 薪资区间和福利是什么？

## 8. 最终建议

- 如果职位仍开放、英文足够、没有硬性 5+ 年经验要求，并且工作内容接近硬件产品管理/产品开发：可以申请。
- 如果职位偏 senior、纯软件 PM、要求独立负责复杂路线图，或语言要求是流利瑞典语/丹麦语：建议跳过或低优先级观察。

- 申请链接：https://thehub.io/jobs/69e2ca3ea9c78524de16a46c

- 本职位摘要：Product manager role shaping SKF intelligent lubrication solutions: connected industrial products, sensing/data/AI, customer value validation, pilots, roadmap input, go-to-market, and collaboration with product development, sales, service and external partners.

- Must-have requirements: 23/30，Engineering/product/business degree and product/innovation/business-development experience align; connected products and AI/ML are stretch areas.

## 4. 主要优势

- Industrial hardware and connected-product direction matches Feiyu’s hardware PM priority.
- Role values early-stage innovation, pilots, customer value validation and external partners, close to SensoryWind evidence.

## 5. 主要风险

- Previous work experience in product/innovation/business development is expected; Feiyu must frame founder work clearly as equivalent.
- Connected products, AI/ML and sensing in industrial settings are preferred and partly a stretch.

- Which connected-products or AI/ML knowledge is must-have versus learnable?

## 9. 申请策略

Apply as a hardware founder with hands-on prototyping, user testing, pilot validation, stakeholder coordination and innovation-to-product experience.

## 10. 最终建议

- 如果职位仍开放、英文足够、并且招聘方接受 SensoryWind 创业/硬件产品开发经验作为相关经验：可以申请。

files.deepReportZh:
# 中文公司与职位深度分析报告

## 1. 快速结论

- 公司：Coretura
- 职位：Product Manager - In-Vehicle Infotainment
- 地点：Gothenburg, Sweden
- 匹配分：76/100
- 初步建议：优先关注/可以申请
- 一句话判断：这个职位在 2026-07-14 的 digest 中通过了初步开放状态、语言和经验筛选；它分数超过 70，所以自动生成中文深度分析，方便你点进详情页直接看。

## 2. 为什么可能适合 Feiyu

- Feiyu 当前定位：刚毕业，约 3 年硬件创业/产品开发经验，优先硬件产品经理、技术产品、产品开发、创新和用户中心的实体产品方向。
- 本职位摘要：Product manager role owning the in-vehicle infotainment domain for Coretura, a Volvo Group and Daimler Truck joint venture building a software-defined commercial-vehicle platform. Scope includes HMI, navigation, connectivity, personalization, roadmap direction and cross-domain dependencies.
- 匹配判断：Strong automotive product stretch with user-facing hardware/software context

## 3. 匹配分拆解

- Must-have requirements: 21/30，Requires solid PM ownership of a technical domain; Feiyu has founder/product ownership but not titled automotive PM.
- Relevant experience: 18/25，Founder, design, HMI/user experience and hardware-system thinking transfer, but embedded/vehicle platform experience is limited.
- Product/domain match: 14/15，Commercial vehicles, driver-facing experience and user-centered HMI are highly relevant to Feiyu’s product/design background.
- Tools/process match: 11/15，Roadmap, ambiguity and stakeholder work fit; architecture-level tradeoffs are a stretch.
- Location/language/work authorization: 8/10，Gothenburg role; no Swedish requirement found in the visible posting.
- Growth potential: 4/5，High-learning role in automotive product, but may be demanding.

## 4. 主要优势

- Automotive/vehicle user experience connects well to Feiyu’s industrial design and hardware product background.
- Coretura is building a software-defined vehicle platform with Volvo Group and Daimler Truck context.
- The posting did not show a hard 5+ years or Swedish requirement in the extracted description.

## 5. 主要风险

- Requires solid Product Manager experience and end-to-end ownership of a technical product domain.
- Specific IVI, cloud-backend connectivity, vehicle UX/UI, embedded/consumer app platforms and security/privacy experience are stretch areas.
- Role scope may be more mid-level than graduate-level.

## 6. 语言与经验筛选

- 语言：No Swedish must-have found in the visible posting; confirm English-only working setup with recruiter.
- 经验：没有发现硬性“必须 5+ 年”作为唯一门槛；如果面试中确认需要非常资深的独立 PM 经验，应降低优先级。

## 7. 薪资信号

- 估算薪资：SEK 48000-75000/month
- 说明：Estimated Gothenburg automotive/software product manager range; exact salary not published.
- 建议确认：月薪、养老金、保险、假期、试用期、加班政策、远程/混合办公规则。

## 8. 申请前要问的问题

- Is founder/product-development experience acceptable for the PM-experience requirement?
- Which IVI or software-defined vehicle skills are mandatory on day one?
- Is English sufficient for daily work?
- What support is available for someone transitioning from industrial design/hardware startup into automotive software product?

## 9. 申请策略

Apply only if willing to position this as a stretch: user-centered hardware/software product thinking, ambiguity, and founder-level ownership.

## 10. 最终建议

- 如果职位仍开放、英文足够、并且招聘方接受 SensoryWind 创业/硬件产品开发经验作为相关经验：可以申请。
- 如果确认要求资深 PM、流利瑞典语，或需要多年特定软件/行业经验：跳过或放低优先级。

## 11. 来源

- 本地网站数据：data/jobs.json
- 申请链接：https://se.linkedin.com/jobs/view/product-manager-in-vehicle-infotainment-at-coretura-4434562715
